channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Uneven pavement, 17th May
item.description:
Pavement has risen in places and dipped in others. Near 49 imperial way. It is a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Imperial Way, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obscured lamp post lighting., 17th May
item.description:
On the opposite side between number 57 & 61 Marmont Road, SE15 , the lamp post is hidden by overhanging branches which has made that part of the street very dark. We would appreciate having this matter dealt with asap please. Many thanks!.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox between bins, 17th May
item.description:
Last three days there has been a dead fox in King George’s park at the first entrance to the park off York Avenue. It is in between the two bins there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northbourne Court, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised Short Stay Cycle Parking, 17th May
item.description:
​Report Details ​Category: Bicycle Stands / Street Furniture / Highway Obstruction ​Location: Sydenham Road, outside of Lidl. ​Description: The short-stay cycle parking stand at this location is severely damaged. It is loose from the pavement and bent, making it completely unusable for locking bicycles and creating a potential trip hazard for pedestrians. Please arrange for a repair or replacement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Sydenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous street furniture, 17th May
item.description:
Needs clearing after car crash. Not accessible for wheelchair users and live electricity

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 17th May
item.description:
This new block of flats constantly has rubbish outside which is disgusting and a health hazard. Needs to be cleaned up and proper rubbish disposal put in place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 251, Beckenham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible Japanese Knotweed, 17th May
item.description:
Resident suspects that a plant coming up through the pavement on Willow Vale by the road sign on the Lyndhurst side may be Japanese Knotweed. Can you please check and take any appropriate action? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Vale, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs left on street, 17th May
item.description:
This stretch of Foulden Road from here to corner of Amhurst frequently has dumped items left on it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags all over pavement fly tipping, 17th May
item.description:
Ongoing issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haselbury Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flying tipping outside bin store, 17th May
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped outside of the bins . Since Friday 15/05/2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Oak Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 17th May
item.description:
People constantly leave litter bags on top of and new bin. Please empty and remove this bin as it encourages mess on pavement and street constantly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Hindmans Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 17th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Kingswood, 17th May
item.description:
Dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingswood Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipped Christmas tree, 17th May
item.description:
Christmas tree fly tipped in the gated nature area also fig tree waste fly tipped on site.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 17th May
item.description:
This van has been left with a domestic fridge balanced on the roof not secured and in danger of falling off. It also has a flat rear tyre. It been left for several days appears dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes space, 17th May
item.description:
The amount of bikes taking spaces over three pay by phone spaces and also blocking a private entrance to the garden. As well as bikes being in middle of the street and being difficult for cars to go around

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Lowndes Square, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and fridge dumped, 17th May
item.description:
Rubbish all over pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walsham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thames water flap leaking water into pavement and road, 17th May
item.description:
Water flooding pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartford Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing, 17th May
item.description:
This litterbin is once again overflowing. I last reported this same bin on 6 May. Clearly it needs emptying more often

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter across the street, 17th May
item.description:
Bin bags are frequently left on top of the bin opposite family stores, which means that the foxes get into the bags and spread litter across the street. Please can the bin here be removed, to stop people leaving bin bags on top of it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
